name: Ginkgo Bioworks Holdings Inc. Class A Common Stock
summary: Ginkgo Bioworks Holdings, Inc. is a biotechnology company that designs and programs cells to create products across a variety of markets, including food, agriculture, pharmaceuticals, and industrial chemicals. The company's platform enables customers to develop new organisms for specific applications, accelerating the development of innovative products. Ginkgo Bioworks is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.
